calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Continued To Jul-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to JUL-24-2018 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Continued To Jun-05-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Harijot S. Khalsa, Esq. of Sessions Fishman Nathan & Israel, LLC, T:619.758.1891 for Defendant Transworld Systems Inc., by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT TRANSWORLD SYSTEMS INC. MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT.

Defendant TRANSWORLD SYSTEMS INC.'s Motion To Set Aside the August 16, 2017 default is treated as a motion for entry of a judgment providing that Transworld is not entitled to any of the interpleaded monies and plaintiffs take nothing against Transworld. The parties' only dispute is whether Transworld should be required to pay costs of $875.67 to plaintiffs. They should not because Transworld never claimed nor purported to claim any entitlement to the interpleaded funds. Because no judgment has been entered as to Transworld, the best way to conclude this matter as between plaintiffs and Transworld is for entry of a judgment providing that Transworld is not entitled to any of the interpleaded monies and plaintiffs take nothing against Transworld.

ORDER and JUDGMENT signed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
